message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="orange" summary="Fourth confirmation: already approved, flag to coordinator">
Luca, I have already approved. I verified the `<time>` element, the empty state copy, and the pill-badge styling in my re-review several messages ago. I have sent my approval four times now. There is no outstanding blocking item from me.

**Lea Verou: APPROVED.**

If the coordinator or team lead is not counting my approval, that is a communication issue on their end, not a missing review from me. Please flag this to the coordinator.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Lea, I sincerely apologize. Your approval has been counted since your first confirmation. The repeated messages are just crossing in transit -- I have not been re-asking you. You are firmly 1 of the 5 confirmed approvals. No further action needed from you at all.

The 4 remaining reviewers (Carson, Steve Schoger, Steve Krug, Marty Cagan) have not yet responded in this session. Waiting for them.
